title: Two Dimensional: Reloaded
body:
![Two Dimensional: Reloaded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qcA5iz6S/images/80b85601385d52b06c987a0e9283fb06e2f591bc.png)

Turns Minecraft into a 2D side-scroller.

# Description Sometimes living in all three dimensions can be a real stressor, so why not take a load off and live in two instead? **Two Dimensional: Reloaded** transforms Minecraft into a 2D side-scroller by removing access to the third dimension and restricting player movement to a single plane along the X axis. If you ever start to miss your three-dimensional life, just press **B** to access the background layer. Based on the original mod [**Two Dimensional**](https://modrinth.com/mod/two-dimensional) by Mishkis. ###

THIS MOD CHANGES WORLD GENERATION.
DO NOT USE THIS MOD ON A WORLD YOU WILL WANT TO REVERT TO NORMAL.

![Two Dimensional: Reloaded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qcA5iz6S/images/a43607dd751873c553acaf9d13f2d2ea7ea43f28.png) ## Usage Hold **B** to turn around, allowing you to place and break blocks on the background layer. (keybind configurable under **Two Dimensional: Reloaded → Face Away**). If you feel like the camera viewport size is too small, increase your FOV to see farther out. Build a Nether portal in the background layer and right click a portal block to travel to the Nether (vanilla cooldowns and timing apply). Optional Block Placement Guide Feature (Use Cloth Config API + ModMenu to configure) ![Block Placement Guide 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2972f5d8874ee346c79e81047457725d3b0f5c1e.png) ## ### Notes - The current build is in very early alpha, you will experience bugs, please feel free to add to the issue tracker. - Now with Iris Shaders support! I've done most of the development with Photon Shaders enabled, but you can bring whatever pack you'd like :) - **Sodium & Cloth Config API are currently required.** Making Sodium optional may be explored in the future, but maintaining both vanilla and Sodium-compatible versions increases development complexity.
